calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:20am
Judge Alexander Anolik, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, department 525:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals. Appellant, Van Sales and Company, appears in Pro Per through Than Van and Gene Van; Respondent, Fuku Produce, appears in Pro Per through Samuel Chih. Parties, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative.

Note: An Acknowlegement of Satisfaction of Judgment, Fully Satisfied as to Van Sales and Company, dated Oct-8-09, was signed by Samuel Chin and filed by the Court. Mr. Chih signed the form in error, believing he was simply confirming the award. The filing is striken by Judge Anolik in open Court, and the hearing proceeds.

No evidence is marked or retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Judgment Entered
